content.en:
Outside the Dark Forbidden Territory.

A Ninefold Supreme appeared here, and suddenly a third-rank invincible of the Terran Race came out of the Dark Forbidden Realm and was immediately captured by a Ninefold Supreme Being.

"Seniors, what are you going to do?"

The third-class invincible man of the human race was very panicked, the breath of these people was far beyond his imagination, and a wisp of breath suppressed him so that he couldn't move, it must be a supreme above the invincible, and it was not an ordinary supreme.

He had also seen several supreme beings of the human race, except for the mysterious Endless Ancestor, the aura of the other supreme beings was far inferior to these.

These few people are afraid that they are all top existences among the supreme, why did such a strong man catch him?

He wondered how he had offended them, or had the Terrans offended them?

"Send a message to your Terrans, and let the Endless Ancestors come over. "

One of the Nine Beings commanded.

The third-rank invincible people of the Terran race immediately realized that they were the enemies of the Endless Ancestors, and immediately did not dare to disobey their orders, and hurriedly summoned the high-ranking people of the human race, and then let the high-level send a message to the supremes.

As for him, there is no way to contact the Supreme One directly.

Soon, several Supreme Beings of the Human Race knew about the situation, but they did not leave the Dark Forbidden Domain directly, after all, the other party was directly looking for Ye Tian, and it must be an incomparably powerful Supreme One.

And they are too weak to compete with such a powerful supreme being, and if they go out, they will only add a prisoner to the enemy.

"All the Terrans are not allowed to leave the Dark Forbidden Realm, there is a supreme enemy in the outside world!"

Several supreme beings of the human race spread the word one after another, and even closed the third-order gates one by one.

At the same time, they contacted Ye Tian, who had just returned and was cultivating.

"Father, several Supreme Beings have appeared outside the Dark Forbidden Realm. "

Ye Xingchen came to meet Ye Tian.

"Xingchen, I know, you go down, you can't participate in this matter. Ye Tian muttered.

In fact, he also knew it immediately, and even guessed the reason.

I'm afraid these Supreme Beings are here for the Primordial Tree, the value of the Primordial Tree is too high, even just a primordial leaf is enough to make many Supreme Beings crazy!

It was normal for these Supreme Beings to come and snatch his Primordial Tree, and even if they didn't have the evidence, it was enough to take the risk.

Ye Tian could have ignored them, but if they didn't go, they were afraid that they would become even worse, and once the Dark Forbidden Domain was no longer blessed by the Source Sea, the Supreme Beings from the outside world would come in, and once there was a big war, it would affect the Dark Forbidden Domain.

Therefore, he was ready to deal with this matter directly, so that the outside forces knew that he Ye Tian was not easy to mess with.

Wow!

Ye Tian crossed the Dark Forbidden Realm in one step, came to the Source Sea of the outside world, and also saw the five Ninefold Supremes.

These Ninefold Supremes are all at the pinnacle of the Ninefold Supreme's realm, and they are only one step away from the half-step Eternal Realm, but if there is no earth-shattering opportunity, it will be difficult for them to break through to the half-step Eternal Realm in their lifetime.

It is precisely because of this that they are eager to obtain the opportunity of the primordial tree.

"Five Ninefold Supremes!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

If it was five half-step Eternal Realms, he really wouldn't be able to establish his authority.

However, the Half-Step Eternal Realm was already scarce, that is, only a top loose force like the Source God Pavilion could have so many Half-Step Eternal Realms.

In fact, many of the powerhouses of the Source God Pavilion belonged to other forces, and in a sense, they overlapped with some forces.

However, Ye Tian was sure that these Nine Supreme Beings must be in the same force as the members of the Inner Circle of the Source God Pavilion, so that they could get the news as soon as possible.

"What do you mean, why did you capture one of my Terran invincibles?"

Ye Tian asked.

One of the Ninefold Supremes said in a deep voice, "Endless Ancestor, I heard that you have a primordial tree in your hands, hand it over." "

"Primordial Tree?" Ye Tian sneered, "Who told you that I have the Primordial Tree on me?"

"It doesn't matter who it is, the point is, if you don't hand it over, not only will this Terran invincible fall, but when your dark forbidden realm has passed the protection period, we will destroy this eternal world. The other party threatened.

"Are you threatening me?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He knew very well that even if he didn't admit it, the other party wouldn't believe it, and even if he swore it, the other party wouldn't believe it.

After all, he has the ability to clone himself, and this information is no longer a secret, and when the time comes, making an oath will only affect this body, but the body will not be affected.

As a result, they will not believe their oaths.

These five people all wore robes and masks that concealed their aura, but their identities couldn't hide Ye Tian at all.

Through the probing of the copying talents and the understanding of their names, Ye Tian soon locked down their identities.

"The five of Jinlan Mountain, do you really want to be my enemy?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Identity revealed?"

The five Ninefold Supremes were surprised.

They didn't make a move, if they did, they wouldn't be able to completely conceal their breath and half-step eternal technique, and it was normal to be guessed.

But now, Ye Tian recognized them at a glance, which made them a little shocked.

"Few, aren't you afraid that I will retaliate against Jinlan Mountain and your Eternal Heaven and Earth?" Ye Tiandao.

"Don't be afraid!"

One of them smiled and said: "If we get your Primordial Tree, we will have to give up Jinlan Mountain, as for the eternal heaven and earth behind us, you can destroy it, anyway, if we take away the people close to us, what do we have to do with the lives of other people? But you should care a lot about the human race and the Dark Forbidden Realm, right?"

Ye Tian was silent for dozens of seconds, and then said: "That's it, I'll fight with you, if you win, I'll hand over the Primordial Tree, if you lose, you can't fight the idea of the Primordial Tree again, how about it?"

"No problem!"

The five Ninefold Supremes immediately agreed.

However, they still didn't let go of the third-rank invincible of the Terran Race, but sealed it up and threw it into one of their own void balls.

Subsequently, the battle began.

Bang!!!!!

In addition to not using the fingers of the Eternal Realm, Ye Tian showed his combat power between the Ninefold Supreme and the Half-Step Eternal Realm.

In fact, his regular combat power was already enough to fight with the weaker half-step Eternal Realm, which was equivalent to the weakest half-step Eternal Realm.

And these five Ninefold Supreme Beings did not have the combat power of the half-step Eternal Realm, so they were naturally inferior to Ye Tian in the regular state.

If Ye Tian didn't hide his strength, he was afraid that he would scare them.

At the same time, he had another plan.

As soon as they fought, the expressions of the five supreme beings changed drastically, and they were completely suppressed by Ye Tian.

After a few hours, the five Supreme Beings had begun to suffer minor injuries.

"Retreat first, gather more strength, and then threaten the Endless Ancestor!" one of the Nine Beings suggested.

"Yes!"

"Yes!"

The other Nine Supreme Beings agreed.

So, they said in unison: "We admit defeat!"

"Let that third-class invincible go, he's of little value to you, and you're not going to be mortal enemies with me for the sake of a human invincible, right?"

Ye Tian said.

"Put!"

They unleashed the invincible.

And after Ye Tian grabbed the Terran Invincible with one hand, he threw it into the Dark Forbidden Domain.

After that, Ye Tian intercepted the five Ninefold Primibles.

"You, I'm afraid you can't go!"

Ye Tian sneered.
